name: Weis-Shirokov Theorem 2 (Face dimension under generalized affine constraint)
source: S. Weis and M.E. Shirokov, 'The face generated by a point, generalized affine constraints, and quantum theory', J. Convex Anal. 28(3), 847-870, 2021. arXiv:2003.14302. LOCAL: references/weis_shirokov_2021.pdf. STRING MATCH VERIFIED: 'Theorem 2. Let f : K → R ∪ {+∞} be a generalized affine map... If the face FC(x) of C generated by x has dimension m ∈ N0, then the face FK(x) of K generated by x has dimension m or m + 1.'
